name: Trendline Adult Cat Food - Multi-colour 1kg
description: Trendline Adult Cat Food -multi-color , fully balanced all-natural cat food with chicken protein, brewer's yeast for immune support, Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed and taurine. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein …………………………….. 27% Fat …………………………………….10% Crude Ash ……………………………8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ………….3%  Thoughtfully Selected Ingredients Processed animal protein, wheat, corn, animal fat, corn gluten, dried sugar beet, liver aroma, salt, flaxseed, dried brewer’s yeast, taurine.  Fortified With Essential Nutrients Minerals: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. Vitamins: A, D, E, C, K, and B-complex (B1, B2, B3 [niacin], B6, B7 [biotin], B9 [folic acid], B12), Choline, Calcium Pantothenate. These help your cat:  . Maintain strong immunity.  . Develop and sustain healthy bones and teeth.  . Support optimal metabolism and digestion.  Feeding Guide Feed 50–80g daily for every 4kg adult cat, depending on activity level and age. Always provide plenty of fresh water.
